law: GitHub issue state is evidence, not proof. Proof = landed SHA + behavioral/negative test. Disagreement is recorded, never silently resolved.
privacy: aukora-symbiote rows are PRIVATE_HOLD: number/state/url/family/disposition only; titles/bodies stay in the private repo.
